happierHomeDir.description: If set, exported as HAPPIER_HOME_DIR for the happier process.

happierServer.description: Server profile id/name to target via prefix: happier --server <id-or-name> ...

happierServerUrl.description: Ad-hoc server URL to target via prefix: happier --server-url <url> ...

happierWebappUrl.description: Required when happierServerUrl is set; used via prefix: happier --webapp-url <url> ...

defaultTimeoutSeconds.description: Default timeout used for session wait/run wait when the caller doesn't provide one.

preferEphemeralServerSelection.description: If true, prefer --server-url/--webapp-url over persisting server use.
